title: The Sunny Reaches the Entrance
description: On pages 9–12, this part follows Narrator, Unknown person #1, Chopper, Fish-Men, Luffy, Franky, Zoro. The core story beat is the sunny reaches the entrance.
scene: The scene centers on the sunny reaches the entrance, with Narrator, Unknown person #1, Chopper, Fish-Men, Luffy, Franky, Zoro driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's surrounded by a gigantic bubble... there might be air inside...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's HUGF!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: All RIIIGHT!!! We Madeeeeeitt!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One of the greatest sights of the Grand Line!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The island where the mermaids dance!! The exquisite beauty of the mermaid Princess!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: O... ohh... we've made it... have we.....?!! kehihi...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've finally found it... the paradise I've dreamed of since I was but a child...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: mer-mallids!! Mer-mail naturalph!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sanji! It's no good!! Just the anticipation is already killing him?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm sorry, Sanji... I wasn't able to treat you in time... you probably shouldn't be allowed to meet any real mermaids...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Doctor!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: meeting the mermaids of fishman Island is this man's dream!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But if he meets them, he'll die!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So be it, then...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sanji!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: better to die ogling the mermaids to my heart's content... than to live with my dream unfulfilled...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He's terrible!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I will meet them!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Man, I can't wait... I wonder what kind of meat they use in fishman Island food...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Luffy! Could you wipe that drool away and talk to surume? We need to find the entrance to the island!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, what the heck are these guys?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Wow, that's so cool!! And there's someone riding them?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why do you submit to the likes of these mere humans, Kraken?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aaaah H!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What're you doing, surume?! You still gotta carry uuuus!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Who on earth...?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aaaagh!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A pirate ship... you, too, may be called enemies of men. Thus, you have the right to choose!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A swarm of sea monsters?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aaaaaaha Aaarchhhh!! It's all over!! We were so close, too!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You must be the straw hat pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We know the name well... it was your crew who once defeated the wrong pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: were that the end of it, our response would be clear. However...!!

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: I also hear that two years ago, you protected Hachi-san, former member of the Arlong Pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and even went so far as to deal a blow to the foul tenryubito...!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: Such acts parallel those of our beloved hero of fishman Island, the great Fisher Tiger!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hamoha Mohamo!! Now, what should we do with do?

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: Will you swear your allegiance to the new fishman pirates...?!! or will you decline?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's hear it from you...!! Are you friend or foe?

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: warrier of the new fishman pirates HAMMMOND (a conger fishman)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Remember someone

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If you decline, then we will sink your ship forth!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What did you say?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Franky, get the ship filled up with fuel!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What are you planning?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you honestly think Luffy and the others are going to submit to these people?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but at the same time, we're ten thousand metres below the ocean surface!! We can't fight them down here; we wouldn't stand a chance!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: So we'll have to run!! We'll use all the air we have left for one last coup de burst to fire us straight into fishman Island!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are you insane?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...If we don't do it, we'll be destroyed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: True... I see no other hope of survival.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Franky! You take the helm! I'll deal with the fuel!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: You got it!! You can super leave it to me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well?!?! Will you submit to us?! straw hat Luffy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: All-out coup de burst...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ready to fire!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Forget it!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You dummies!!!

summary: The Sunny Reaches the Entrance. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
